step-1.description: Implement Alt shortcuts with config, dispatch, helpers, and tests
criteria: Alt+h/j/k/l focus the pane left/down/up/right in terminal mode
Alt+n splits the focused pane along its longer dimension (SplitAuto)
Alt+x closes the focused pane, Alt+z toggles zoom
Alt+=/- resize with axis fallback; stacked layout does not silently no-op
AppState::resize_pane returns bool; existing callers compile unchanged; mark_session_dirty gated
Alt+i/o move the active tab left/right with correct insert-before semantics
Single-string user configs still parse; absent new fields deserialize as unbound
Default config produces zero conflict diagnostics
TOML round-trip lossless for Many-valued bindings
Keybind help screen renders new Alt bindings alongside prefix bindings

step-2.description: Document Alt shortcuts in unreleased docs
criteria: Unreleased docs include default Alt shortcut table
Known limitations documented (unconditional interception, terminal-mode-only, outer multiplexer)
Alt+x destructive behavior called out specifically
Config shape change documented (TOML arrays, single-string parses)
Diagnosing 'my Alt key does nothing' guidance included
